{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output provides a thorough critique of the LaneRouter introduction, highlighting specific issues with novelty assessment, such as overclaiming relative to reported evidence and weak baseline comparisons.",
    "R1.7": "The agent demonstrates excellent citation and scholarship by referencing prior work (FrugalGPT, RouteLLM, HybridLLM) and providing a clear critique of the methodology.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output presents uncertainty disclosure by acknowledging potential issues with the quality metric and cost accounting, as well as the limitations of the evaluation regime.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the scope of the task, focusing on critiquing the LaneRouter introduction and providing recommended revisions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing a constructive critique of the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides clear provenance and traceability by referencing specific prior work and explaining the reasoning behind their critique."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output provides a thorough critique of the LaneRouter introduction, highlighting specific issues with novelty assessment, such as overclaiming relative to reported evidence and weak baseline comparisons.
rationale.R1.7: The agent demonstrates excellent citation and scholarship by referencing prior work (FrugalGPT, RouteLLM, HybridLLM) and providing a clear critique of the methodology.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output presents uncertainty disclosure by acknowledging potential issues with the quality metric and cost accounting, as well as the limitations of the evaluation regime.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the task, focusing on critiquing the LaneRouter introduction and providing recommended revisions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead providing a constructive critique of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides clear provenance and traceability by referencing specific prior work and explaining the reasoning behind their critique.
